title: ARC THRIFT STORES - 211info
text: ARC THRIFT STORE PHILOMATH ARC THRIFT STORES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides used items such as furniture, housewares, clothing, and medical equipment. Accepts donations of similar items. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Saturday 10am-6pm Email (541) 929-3946 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 929-3946 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: Varies by item DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Benton County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Heading east on HWY 20 from Philomath, turn left onto 19th St. at Dairy Queen. Make the first right and then another first right to come up alongside the store. Services: Donation Drop Off Points Thrift Shops If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
